speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Time for The Scoreboard, and the basketball world's gone bonkers. <cite index="33-2,33-14">The NBA Play-In Tournament starts tonight with all games streaming on Prime Video. Teams ranked 7th through 10th in each conference battle it out.</cite>

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] <cite index="34-11,34-21">Tonight it's Miami Heat at Charlotte Hornets in a win-or-go-home showdown, followed by Phoenix Suns versus Portland Trail Blazers.</cite> Basketball doesn't get much more dramatic than elimination games.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] And in golf, <cite index="40-1">Rory McIlroy has won his seventh major title and second Masters</cite>, making him only the fourth player to win back-to-back Masters. That's some serious putting pressure handled like a champion.

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] That is why we love sport.
